dual_casting.name: Dual Casting
dual_casting.description: Setup/Builder: A combined strike of steel and sorcery. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Balance Pip.

balance_point.name: Balance Point
balance_point.description: Setup: Align your physical and spiritual forces. Generates 2 Balance Pips and grants [Focused].

spellsword_burst.name: Spellsword Burst
spellsword_burst.description: Payoff: Channel pure energy through your blade. Consumes 5 Balance Pips to deal Physical and Magic damage simultaneously.

arcane_cleave.name: Arcane Cleave
arcane_cleave.description: Payoff/AOE: A wide swing infused with arcane force. Consumes 3 Balance Pips to deal AOE damage.

red_barrier.name: Red Barrier
red_barrier.description: Defense: A field that absorbs both Physical and Magic damage using both Stamina and Concentration pools.

displacing_strike.name: Displacing Strike
displacing_strike.description: Defense/Mobility: Strike the target and briefly blink out of existence. Reduces enemy hit chance.

mystic_marching.name: Mystic Marching
mystic_marching.description: Mobility: Teleport to any ally in the same room or adjacent room.

chain_spell.name: Chain Spell
chain_spell.description: Utility/Signature: Your next 5 non-signature blessings are cast twice sequentially for 0 cost.

red_mage_physiology.name: Red Mage Physiology
red_mage_physiology.description: Passive: Hybrid Mastery. You gain 10% increased damage from all sources and your Balance Pip generation is doubled when your HP is above 50%.
